name: deprecated
description: Whether a semantic schema definition or schema member is deprecated.

aiGuidance.purpose: Marks schema vocabulary that remains valid for compatibility but should no longer be used for new data. This is schema vocabulary deprecation, not the lifecycle timestamp `deprecatedAt` used by some structural schemas.
aiGuidance.extraction: Set true only when the specification explicitly deprecates this schema definition or schema member. Use lifecycle metadata or `deprecatedAt` separately when recording when deprecation occurred.
